# Whispers from the Cosmic Horizon
## Scripture
"The heavens declare the glory of God; the skies proclaim the work of his hands." - Psalm 19:1

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we're reminded of the vast expanse of God's creation. The stars, galaxies, and cosmic phenomena whisper secrets of His majesty and power. The universe is a grand tapestry, woven with threads of wonder and awe. In the stillness of the night, we can hear the whispers of God's glory, echoing through the cosmos. Just as the celestial horizon stretches out before us, inviting exploration and discovery, God's love and presence beckon us to venture deeper into the mysteries of His heart.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we stand at the cosmic horizon, we're humbled by the vastness of Your creation. Help us to listen to the whispers of Your glory, echoing through the stars and galaxies. May we be drawn into the depths of Your love, where wonder and awe await. As we explore the mysteries of the universe, may we discover the beauty and majesty of Your presence, guiding us on our journey. In the stillness of the night, whisper Your truth and love into our hearts, that we may proclaim Your glory to a world in need of Your light.
